title: FabricationLearningOutcomeInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime JSON payloads for fabrication outcome learning workers that update MDP, POMDP, neural-policy, reward, replay, and failure-boundary memory from observed print, mill, lathe, sheet-cutting, postprocess, and assembly attempts.

FabricationLearningSourceRef.title: FabricationLearningSourceRef
FabricationLearningSourceRef.description: Reference to an artifact, plan, operation, boundary, or worker result that produced evidence for learning.

refId.description: Stable id of the referenced object.

refKind.description: Reference kind such as assembly-plan, instruction-artifact, machine-observation, inspection-report, operator-note, failure-boundary, or generated-result.

uri.description: Sanitized URI or object key when the source has a retained artifact. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the referenced artifact when available.

evidence.description: Evidence labels attached to this source reference.

FabricationLearningObservation.title: FabricationLearningObservation
FabricationLearningObservation.description: One observed manufacturing outcome, measurement, human intervention, machine state, or inspection fact.

observationKind.description: Observation kind such as machine-log, inspection-measurement, operator-intervention, failure-boundary, part-quality, assembly-fit, simulation-delta, or material-state.

machineId.description: Machine, station, or capability id associated with this observation.

machineClass.description: Machine class such as additive-fdm, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, laser, waterjet, plasma, postprocess-station, inspection, or assembly.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this observation when known.

partId.description: Part or subassembly id associated with this observation when known.

outcome.description: Outcome label such as success, failure, partial-success, operator-intervention-required, rework-required, scrap, blocked-before-start, or simulation-only.

metrics.description: Compact metric labels or key=value strings, e.g. runtimeSec=2480, boreErrorMm=0.035, filamentMoisture=high, collisionCount=0.

FabricationLearningFailureBoundary.title: FabricationLearningFailureBoundary
FabricationLearningFailureBoundary.description: Observed or retained boundary where the machine could not complete without human intervention, process split/combine change, extra evidence, or rework.

boundaryKind.description: Boundary kind such as human-intervention, split-required, combine-required, workholding, material-conditioning, thermal-state, toolpath, postprocess, inspection, assembly-fit, or controller-state.

message.description: Human-readable boundary summary safe for logs.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this boundary when known.

partId.description: Part id associated with this boundary when known.

humanInterventionRequired.description: True when the boundary required explicit human action or review.

recommendedAction.description: Recommended action such as split-part, combine-parts, add-inspection-step, reroute-process, request-human-review, retry-with-new-setup, or mark-scrap.

FabricationLearningRewardSignal.title: FabricationLearningRewardSignal
FabricationLearningRewardSignal.description: Reward, penalty, action, state-feature, or observation hint for MDP/POMDP/neural learning.

signalId.description: Stable reward or policy signal id.

signalKind.description: Signal kind such as mdp-state, pomdp-observation, policy-action, reward, penalty, replay-label, neural-feature, or outcome-label.

stateFeatures.description: Compact state features retained for learning.

action.description: Action taken or recommended, such as split-part, keep-monolithic, add-fixture, wait-for-temperature, stop-for-human-review, or reroute-to-lathe.

value.description: Reward or penalty value when available.

observations.description: POMDP observations, uncertainty labels, or human-review notes.

FabricationLearningModelUpdate.title: FabricationLearningModelUpdate
FabricationLearningModelUpdate.description: Accepted or rejected model, policy, replay, memory, or boundary update returned by a learning worker.

modelKind.description: Model kind such as mdp-policy, pomdp-belief, neural-policy, reward-model, replay-buffer, failure-boundary-memory, split-combine-policy, or quality-predictor.

modelName.description: Model, memory, policy, replay buffer, or boundary table name.

modelVersion.description: Model version after applying or proposing the update.

updateKind.description: Update kind such as append-replay, update-policy, update-belief, label-boundary, adjust-reward, quarantine-sample, or reject-sample.

accepted.description: True when the learning worker accepted this update for retention.

artifactUri.description: Sanitized retained model, replay, or label artifact URI when available.

FabricationLearningOutcomeRequest.title: FabricationLearningOutcomeRequest
FabricationLearningOutcomeRequest.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.learning.outcomes.requests after a fabrication attempt, simulation, operator review, or inspection produces learning evidence.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Producers should emit dd.fabrication.learning-outcome.request.v1.

requestId.description: Unique id for this learning outcome job, suitable for dedupe and result correlation.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id that produced the outcome.

jobId.description: Fabrication job id that produced the outcome.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the planner published this learning outcome request.

producer.description: Producer service instance or deployment name.

resultSubject.description: Subject workers should publish the result to; defaults to dd.remote.fabrication.learning.outcomes.results.

outcomeStatus.description: Overall outcome status such as success, failure, partial-success, rework-required, operator-intervention-required, scrap, blocked-before-start, or simulation-only.

selectedPlanId.description: Assembly or process plan id used for the attempt when known.

sources.description: Referenced plans, instruction artifacts, inspection reports, operator notes, or machine logs.

observations.description: Observed facts and outcomes from the fabrication attempt.

rewardSignals.description: Reward, penalty, state, observation, action, or replay-label hints for learning.

priority.description: Optional scheduling hint. Higher values mean more urgent learning update work.

FabricationLearningOutcomeResult.title: FabricationLearningOutcomeResult
FabricationLearningOutcomeResult.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.learning.outcomes.results with accepted learning updates, replay labels, reward summaries, retained boundaries, and model-memory metadata.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Workers should emit dd.fabrication.learning-outcome.result.v1.

requestId.description: Learning outcome request id this result answers.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id from the original learning outcome request.

jobId.description: Fabrication job id from the original learning outcome request.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the learning worker published this result.

workerId.description: Worker id, pod name, or adapter instance that produced this result.

learner.description: Learner, policy, replay, memory, boundary, or model adapter used.

learnerVersion.description: Learner or adapter version used for repeatability and audit.

success.description: True when the worker completed its requested learning update or review work.

retainedBoundaries.description: Failure boundaries retained for future planner and analyzer decisions.

rewardSummary.description: Compact human-readable reward or penalty summary.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings that should be retained with the learning evidence.

reviewMetadata.description: Free-form non-secret metadata such as replay ids, policy names, training split, quarantine reason, confidence, or model registry pointers.
